title: Challenge cup-winning coach and broadcaster John Kear dies aged 71 as tributes pour in
summary_full: Rugby league mourns the loss of influential figure John Kear, who passed away at 71. Renowned for his tactical acumen and ability to inspire underdogs, Kear's four-decade career as a coach, mentor, and broadcaster earned him widespread respect. His legacy includes transforming struggling teams and fostering a deep love for the sport.
